question_text: Compare the energy content of 100g of almonds (2400 kJ) and 100g of apple (200 kJ). How many times more energy does the almonds contain?
explanation: To compare, divide the larger energy value by the smaller one: 2400 ÷ 200 = 12. Almonds contain 12 times more energy than apples per 100g. This is because nuts are high in fats, which store more energy than the water-rich flesh of apples.
